name: Carrot Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix sugar and applesauce.
2. Add eggs and vanilla to the mixture and stir until combined.
3. In a smaller bowl, combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and cinnamon.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture with shredded carrots and raisins.
5. Pour the batter into two buttered 5 3/4-by-3-by-2 1/8 inch loaf pans.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 40 to 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool in the pans for 10 minutes before turning off and transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
